settings.heading: The Story
settings.story_text: DoodleType started as a notebook. A 12-year-old named Antonio just kept drawing characters — weird ones, funny ones, ones with way too much personality for a piece of paper. So we put them on tees. Now those doodles are a brand. Wear your weird.

settings.heading: Find Your Character.
settings.subheading: 9 weirdos. 1 tee each. $29 and it's yours.

settings.heading: Get Early Access
settings.subheading: New characters drop when they drop. Be first.
